title: lithospermum szechenyi
intro: Lithospermum szechenyi, also known as Hungarian oracon, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia, belonging to the borage family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, and is known to have expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. Lithospermum szechenyi has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral activities. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to treat various health conditions, including coughs, colds, and bronchitis.
